checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
No CAPTCHA detected on main page or login
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
No login form found at common paths

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: gptbot, anthropic, claude, google-extended, ccbot
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 460 divs with only 1 semantic elements
Good accessibility: 91/95 interactive elements have labels
No form inputs found
Found 94 elements with stable test selectors
Very little content without JavaScript
No h1 heading — page lacks a clear title for agents
Good link accessibility: 94/94 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns structured JSON error with code and message
No rate limit headers found
Returns 405 but missing Allow header

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~40,252 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 17 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~12,943 tokens (32% of page) — utility class bloat
Reading this page costs $0.05–$0.60 per load ($0.25–$3.02 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Missing essential landmarks: main, navigation
All 86 images have alt attributes (0 descriptive, 86 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
No custom tabindex — relying on natural focus order (fine for simple pages)

checks.name: performance
findings: Fast response: 178ms
Moderate payload: 157KB
No redirects — direct access
Lean resources: 5 scripts, 1 styles, 86 images
Compression enabled: gzip
